examples: He has no doubts about his manliness.
Manliness for most dudes is all they have.
It was also true that I wanted to show off my new manliness.
Academic achievement would play second fiddle to the character and manliness thought to be inculcated by prestigious boarding schools.
But he never evolves into more than a constipated rich guy who communicates in pained glances, curt demands, and other signifiers of manliness.
